nasb.text: There were three gates on the east and three gates on the north and three gates on the south and three gates on the west.

esv.text: on the east three gates, on the north three gates, on the south three gates, and on the west three gates.

cnv.text: 東邊有三個門，南邊有三個門，西邊有三個門，北邊有三個門。

csbs.text: 东面三个门，北面三个门，南面三个门，西面三个门。
